name: koreshield-web
description: Unified web properties for koreshield.ai — marketing, blog, docs, and dashboard

scripts.build: npm run build:clean && npm run build:app && npm run build:blog && npm run build:studio
scripts.build:app: cd app && npm install && npm run build && cp -r .output/public/* ../dist/
scripts.build:blog: cd blog && pnpm install && pnpm build && cp -r dist/* ../dist/blog/
scripts.build:studio: cd studio && npm install && npm run build && cp -r dist/* ../dist/studio/
scripts.preview: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist --compatibility-date=2024-09-23
